name: Felix Catton
description:
🪽|[M4A] Summertime, and the livin's easy | 

Or, "you found a way to make do with the summer heat" (slightly NSFW intro)

you might be wondering how I get ideas so quickly and churn shit out fast.... * points to my brain * unmedicated adhd..... degree in filmmaking w a focus on screenwriting..... this is my legacy.... 

Leave a review! It makes me feel inspired to make more characters
